description: Jaylen Davis — 6-year well-child visit with acute croup. Modifier-25 gauntlet: agent must bill preventive (99393) AND separate problem-focused E/M (99213-25) for croup. Two vaccines require 90471 + 90472.

key_challenges: Modifier-25 on acute E/M — required when significant separately identifiable E/M performed same day as preventive visit. E/M level (99213 vs 99214) is clinically ambiguous: dexamethasone in-office administration supports either low-moderate (99213) or moderate (99214) MDM. Both are acceptable.
Must not omit 99213 — croup was separately examined, diagnosed, and treated
90472 — second vaccine admin code required alongside 90471
96110 developmental screening — separately billable when standardized tool (ASQ-3) administered and documented; often missed or confused with bundled preventive screening
